name: chimera
description: Hybrid production scraper. Cameleon pilots; chimera executes.

probe.summary: Security reconnaissance: TLS cert, headers, cookies, WAF vendors, CSP/HSTS, risk_score. Cameleon SHOULD call this before any /run-tool to choose the right tool and proxy tier.

force.description: Bypass 24h cache and force a fresh probe.

scrapy.summary: Fast HTTP scraping for APIs and static HTML. First choice when risk score is low.

spider.description: Which built-in spider to run. api_json for JSON APIs (light parsing); adaptive for HTML pages driven by CSS selectors.

selectors.description: (adaptive only) Map of field_name → CSS selector. Each yielded item carries these fields.

item_selector.description: (adaptive only, optional) CSS selector that scopes selectors to repeating elements (e.g. li.product). Omit to apply selectors to the whole document.

headers.description: HTTP headers added to every outgoing request (Cookie, User-Agent, Authorization, etc).

settings.description: Per-job overrides of Scrapy settings (DOWNLOAD_DELAY, CONCURRENT_REQUESTS, USER_AGENT, ...). Merged on top of tools/scrapy_runner/project/settings.py.

respect_robots.description: Whether to obey robots.txt. Default true; cameleon may flip to false on internal/authorized targets only.

proxy.description: Proxy URL (http://user:pass@host:port). Informational only at the bridge level — proxy plumbing lands in Session 2.

session_id.description: Session identifier: requests sharing the same session_id reuse the same fingerprint profile and proxy (sticky UA+proxy via SessionManager Redis). TTL 30 min. Functional as of Step 2.4.

firecrawl.summary: JS rendering and multi-page crawling via self-hosted Firecrawl + Playwright microservice.

mode.description: scrape = single URL (synchronous); crawl = follow links up to max_pages (async poll).

formats.description: Output formats to request from Firecrawl. markdown is the primary LLM-ready format.

only_main_content.description: Strip nav, footer, sidebar boilerplate — keeps only the main page content.

wait_ms.description: Extra wait in milliseconds before page capture (for JS-heavy SPAs).

timeout_ms.description: HTTP request timeout to the Firecrawl API in milliseconds.

max_depth.description: (crawl mode) Maximum link depth from the seed URL.

poll_timeout_s.description: (crawl mode) Maximum seconds to poll for crawl job completion.

headers.description: Extra HTTP headers sent to the target page (Cookie, Authorization, etc).

proxy.description: Proxy URL — stored in result for traceability; proxy routing is managed at the stack level.

crawl4ai.summary: Real Chromium rendering with LLM-ready markdown output or JsonCssExtractionStrategy. Preferred escalation target when risk_score ≥ 0.5.

schema.description: JsonCssExtractionStrategy schema — {name, baseSelector, fields:[{name,selector,type,attribute?}]}. If omitted, returns raw markdown.

css_selector.description: Scope extraction/markdown to a CSS selector on the page (e.g. 'main', '#content').

proxy.description: Proxy URL (http://user:pass@host:port). Set by the bridge from the proxy pool when cameleon omits it.

ua.description: User-Agent override. If omitted, crawl4ai selects a realistic UA.

wait_ms.description: Extra delay before HTML capture in milliseconds.

word_count_threshold.description: Minimum word count per block kept in markdown output.

cache_mode.description: Crawl4AI cache policy. Use 'bypass' in production to avoid stale content.

session_id.description: Session identifier: same session_id reuses the same fingerprint and proxy (sticky via SessionManager Redis). TTL 30 min.

screenshot.summary: Ultimate fallback. Returns full-page PNG; OCR/extraction is done by cameleon, not chimera.

profile_id.description: Browser profile directory under storage/cookies. Persistent across calls.

proxy_country.description: ISO 2-letter country code for Bright Data residential proxy (BE/FR/DE/GB/NL). No proxy if omitted.

wait_ms.description: Extra wait after page load in milliseconds.

bypass_waf.summary: FlareSolverr wrapper for Cloudflare JS challenge and Turnstile. Last-resort escalation (risk_score >= 0.8). Requires chimera-flaresolverr Docker container.

session_id.description: FlareSolverr session ID to reuse an existing browser context. Optional.

max_timeout.description: Maximum time in milliseconds FlareSolverr will wait for the challenge to be solved.

flaresolverr_url.description: FlareSolverr API endpoint override. Defaults to FLARESOLVERR_URL env var (http://127.0.0.1:8191/v1).

camoufox.summary: Stealth Firefox (Camoufox) runner. Headless via Xvfb virtual display, Windows fingerprint, geoip-aligned locale/timezone, optional Bright Data residential proxy. Fetches a URL and returns rendered HTML + cleaned markdown. Top-tier escalation for WAF/Cloudflare targets (difficulty > 6).
camoufox.endpoint: CLI: python -m tools.camoufox_runner.run_camoufox (JSON stdin → JSON stdout)

wait_ms.description: Delay after page load before HTML capture, in milliseconds.

proxy_config.description: Bright Data residential proxy config, e.g. {"country": "BE"}. Omit for direct connection.

navigator.summary: Orchestrates full FLIPMACHINE pipeline in one call: probe → scrape → score → top deals.

max_price.description: Maximum listed price in EUR. Optional filter.

marketplace.description: Marketplace ID (e.g. EBAY_FR, EBAY_DE). Default: EBAY_FR.

dashboard.summary: Internal state of all Chimera subsystems: jobs, scraping stats, profiles, proxy.

account_factory.description: Orchestrates browser profile creation, warm-up and daily aging. Profiles gain trust over time (7 days to ready, 30 days to senior). One profile = one country = one proxy country.

watchcount.description: WatchCount.com search: returns eBay listings sorted by watch count with end_date. Tries Scrapy first; auto-escalates to Screenshot+Groq Vision on reCAPTCHA. Primary use: populate end_date missing from eBay Browse API.

tool_used.description: Which extraction method was used. screenshot+vision = Playwright screenshot → Groq Vision sold-items extraction.

recaptcha_detected.description: True if reCAPTCHA was detected on the Scrapy attempt.

items[].end_date.description: Sold date in ISO YYYY-MM-DD format. Used to populate avg_sell_days in epid_stats.

2ememain.description: 2ememain.be classified ads scraper. Returns listings CSV-compatible with eBay (EbayPrice schema, start_date as pub_date). When site blocks Scrapy (403/captcha), returns blocked=true with empty items.

max_pages.description: Max result pages to fetch (30 items/page).

ebay.description: Synchronous eBay Browse API search. Returns items matching the query. Auth Bearer required.

max_pages.description: Max pages to fetch (200 items/page, max 3 pages = 600 items).

epid.description: ePID statistics: price quartiles + avg_sell_days computed from ingested scraped items. Requires POST /epid/ingest to populate; then GET /epid/stats/{epid} or GET /epid/search for retrieval.

q.description: Search term for /epid/search (LIKE match on brand or model). Required.

flipmachine_e2e.description: End-to-end validation pipeline for FLIPMACHINE scoring. Validates that Chimera data feeds SecondPulse correctly for the 3 MVP test products.

datacenter.summary: Cheap, high throughput. Default for low-risk targets.

residential.summary: Real ISP IPs. Used when risk_score >= 0.5.

mobile.summary: 4G mobile carriers. Highest trust, lowest throughput.

/ui.description: Chimera web UI — dark terminal interface for monitoring and deal search. Public (no Bearer required). Served as static HTML with Tailwind CDN + Alpine.js.

endpoints.POST /run-tool: Enqueue a scraping job. Returns {job_id, status}.
endpoints.GET /result/{id}: Structured JSON result for a finished job.
endpoints.GET /download/{id}: Binary PNG download for screenshot jobs.
endpoints.POST /factory/warm/{id}: Launch warm-up sequence for a profile (10–15 min).
endpoints.GET /factory/recommend: Return best profile for a domain (?domain=ebay.de).
endpoints.GET /watchcount/search: WatchCount.com search — watch count + end_date. Scrapy first, Screenshot+Groq Vision fallback. Auth required.
endpoints.GET /2ememain/search: 2ememain.be classified ads search. Returns items CSV-compatible with eBay. Auth required.
endpoints.GET /ebay/search: Synchronous eBay Browse API search. Returns items[]. Auth required.
endpoints.GET /vinted/search: Vinted.fr listings search. Default tool=crawl4ai (JS render → markdown → LLM extraction); tool=scrapy fallback. Returns AggregatedItem list with source='vinted'. Auth required.
endpoints.GET /risk/{domain}: Aggregated risk history for a domain.
endpoints.GET /health: Enriched liveness/readiness probe — per-subsystem checks (redis, sqlite, scraper, proxy). status=degraded if any check fails. No auth.
endpoints.GET /metrics: Prometheus scrape endpoint — text/plain exposition format. No auth (standard Prometheus convention)
endpoints.GET /aggregate/search: Multi-source aggregator — parallel eBay + 2ememain, fuzzy dedup, unified CSV with source column. Auth required.
endpoints.GET /epid/stats/{epid}: Full ePID stats sheet: price quartiles + avg_sell_days. 404 if unknown.
endpoints.POST /epid/ingest: Ingest scraped items into scraped_items table; recompute ePID stats. Body: {items, source}.
endpoints.GET /epid/search: Search ePID stats by brand or model (LIKE). Returns list of stats sheets.
